revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-195

Alternative term: Equivalent loudness contour

A contour on a graph, the co-ordinates of which are the frequency and the sound pressure level, joining all points of equal loudness level (equal equivalent loudness).

Reference: C.E.F.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Loudness level contour}}
